summary: Frontend-only testing of the 12-section homepage rewrite. All 10 required data-testid sections found in correct DOM order. Key text verified. Removed sections confirmed absent. No console errors.
critical_code_review_comments:
ExposureBand uses
between 'ACTIVE DOES NOT' and 'MEAN PROTECTED.' — causes textContent to concatenate without space. Not a functional bug, but worth noting if copy is ever scraped programmatically.
